column23: A potentiodynamic technique was used to measure the pitting potential in an aerated solution of 0.6 M sodium chloride and 0.1M sodium bicarbonate. Following pretreatment for 5 min at -1.5 V, the potential was increased-rapidly to -0.5V and thereafter at a steady rate of 1V in 50 min.
column25: Ingots were cast and hot rolled to 20 mm diameter bars which were heat treated at 1100°c for 30 min and cooled in still air.
column27: The specimen surface was ground to a 120 grit finish and 5 cm2 was exposed to the corrodent.
